text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's a beautiful morning, isn't it? A perfect day for
experiments!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I realized that rest is essential so
long as we're alive.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, I want to put this energy to good use! Let's
move forward in exploring the potential of body
modification.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is in a good mood. She seems to
have rested well.
